entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: Sa delete iyong personal impormasyon. Kung ikaw Gumawa ng ito request, tayo magiging delete ang personal impormasyon tayo hold tungkol sa ikaw bilang petsa ng iyong request mula sa aming records at direkta anumang Serbisyo providers sa gawin ang same. Sa some mga kaso, deletion may maging accomplished sa pamamagitan ng de-identification ng ang impormasyon. Kung ikaw pumili sa delete iyong personal impormasyon, ikaw may hindi maging able gamitin certain functions na require iyong personal impormasyon sa operate. Sa Itigil ang selling iyong personal impormasyon. Tayo don’t sell o rent iyong personal impormasyon sa anumang third parties para sa anumang layunin. Tayo gawin hindi sell iyong personal impormasyon para sa monetary consideration. However, sa ilalim ng some circumstances, isang ilipat ng personal impormasyon sa isang third party, o within aming pamilya ng companies, nang walang monetary consideration may maging considered isang “sale” sa ilalim ng California batas. Ikaw ay ang lamang owner ng iyong Personal Data at Maaari bang request disclosure o deletion at anumang oras. Kung ikaw submit isang request sa Itigil ang selling iyong personal impormasyon, tayo magiging Itigil ang paggawa such transfers. Please tala, kung ikaw magtanong amin sa delete o Itigil ang selling iyong data, ito may impact iyong experience kasama ang amin, at ikaw may hindi maging able makilahok sa certain programs o membership mga serbisyo alin require ang usage ng iyong personal impormasyon sa function. Pero sa no circumstances, tayo magiging discriminate laban sa ikaw para sa exercising iyong mga karapatan. Sa exercise iyong California data protection mga karapatan described above, please send iyong request(s) ng email: support@inspir.app Ang Iyong Mga Karapatan sa Proteksyon ng Data, described above, ay covered ng ang CCPA, short para sa ang California Consumer Privacy Act. Hanapin out mas marami, visit ang official California Legislative Impormasyon website. Ang CCPA took effect sa 01/01/2020.

entries.source: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.

entries.source: Try it directly in Socratic Instruction. If you want a gentler explanation first, start with Learn Anything, then move into Socratic questions once you know the basic vocabulary.
entries.value: Subukan ito directly sa Socratic Instruction. Kung ikaw gusto isang gentler paliwanag una, magsimula kasama ang Matutunan ang Anything, pagkatapos lumipat tungo sa Socratic mga tanong once ikaw alam ang basic bokabularyo.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Subukan ito sa Flashcard Builder. Kung ikaw kailangan maunawaan ang paksa bago paggawa mga card, magsimula sa Matutunan ang Anything. Kung ikaw gusto presyon pagkatapos pagrepaso mga card, lumipat tungo sa Quiz Ako Sa Trivia o Viva Pagsasanay.

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Gawing isang serye ng mga nakatuong tanong ang isang konsepto, argumento, problema, teksto, o desisyon. Pakikinggan ng iyong buddy ang bawat sagot, tutukuyin ang mga assumption at kakulangan, at gagabayan ka patungo sa sarili mong pinal na sintesis. Subukan ang: "Tulungan mo akong intindihin ang opportunity cost."

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Unlike isang generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI sa paligid ng mga pag-aaral mode kaya mga mag-aaral Maaari bang magsimula kasama ang kind ng tulong sila kailangan: mga hint, mga tanong, mga quiz, aktibong pag-alala, roleplay, debate, o feedback.

entries.source: Unmute film
entries.value: I-unmute ang pelikula

entries.source: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Suriin ang mga makasaysayang kaganapan sa pamamagitan ng mga sanhi, mitsa, bunga, at mga alternatibong posibilidad.

entries.source: Use
entries.value: Gamitin

entries.source: Use "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. The strongest learning session moves from reading into recall, feedback, and one visible next step.
entries.value: Gamitin "{value1}" bilang isang launchpad, hindi isang stopping punto. Ang pinakamalakas session sa pag-aaral lumilipat mula sa pagbabasa tungo sa recall, feedback, at isa visible susunod hakbang.

entries.source: Use 50/10 breaks
entries.value: Gumamit ng 50/10 na pahinga

entries.source: Use a compact table for given answer, correct idea, misconception, and next move.
entries.value: Gamitin isang compact talahanayan para sa given sagot, correct ideya, maling akala, at susunod lumipat.

entries.source: Use a credibility scorecard and questions to investigate next.
entries.value: Gamitin isang credibility scorecard at mga tanong sa investigate susunod.

entries.source: Use a deep work contract with outcome, block plan, rules, and review.
entries.value: Gamitin isang deep work contract kasama ang kinalabasan, block plano, rules, at repaso.

entries.source: Use a guided path for moving from confusion to examples, checks, and recall.
entries.value: Gamitin isang gabayd landas para sa paglipat mula sa confusion sa mga halimbawa, sinusuri, at recall.

entries.source: Use a live AI learning mode to turn this guide into questions, feedback, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Gamitin isang live Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI sa Gawing ito gabay tungo sa mga tanong, feedback, mga halimbawa, at susunod mga hakbang.

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Gamitin isang live mode Kapag ikaw alam ang eksakto punto ng confusion at gusto ang susunod paliwanag, tanong, hint, o loop sa pagrepaso.

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Gamitin isang mode tuned para sa mga hint, mga tanong, mga quiz, mga flashcard, feedback sa pagsusulat, o pagpaplano.

entries.source: Use a prompt starter
entries.value: Gamitin isang prompt starter

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Gamitin isang structured lesson Kapag ikaw alam ang course area at gusto isang sequenced paliwanag o Magsanay ng set.

entries.source: Use a table with front, back, hint, and common trap.
entries.value: Gamitin isang talahanayan kasama ang harap, likod, hint, at karaniwang patibong.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Gamitin AI bilang isang coach para sa understanding, pagsasanay, at feedback instead ng isang shortcut na quietly removes ang pag-aaral.

entries.source: Use AI as a programming coach, project partner, data interpreter, and research helper while keeping the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Gamitin AI bilang isang programming coach, proyekto partner, data interpreter, at Magsaliksik ng helper habang keeping ang mag-aaral sa ang loop.

entries.source: Use AI as a study workflow, not a shortcut.
entries.value: Gamitin AI bilang isang workflow sa pag-aaral, hindi isang shortcut.

entries.source: Use AI feedback to sharpen structure and clarity without losing your own voice.
entries.value: Gamitin AI feedback sa sharpen structure at clarity nang walang losing iyong own voice.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Gamitin AI para sa mga hint, mga paliwanag, pagkakamali sinusuri, at mga loop sa pagrepaso. Gawin hindi magtanong ito makabuo isang huling sagot ikaw cannot ipaliwanag.

entries.source: Use AI for the next hint, a step check, or draft feedback while keeping the final reasoning and voice yours.
entries.value: Gamitin AI para sa ang susunod hint, isang hakbang suriin, o draft feedback habang keeping ang huli pangangatwiran at voice iyo.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Gamitin AI para sa ang thinking sa paligid ng ang sagot

entries.source: Use AI historical worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy, and evidence labels without confusing roleplay for sources.
entries.value: Gamitin AI pangkasaysayan worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy, at ebidensya labels nang walang confusing roleplay para sa mga source.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: Gumamit ng AI homework coaching para sa mga hint, step check, pangangatwiran sa math, at feedback sa pagsusulat habang nananatiling iyo ang huling gawa.

entries.source: Use AI simulations as learning scaffolds while keeping sources, evidence, and interpretation clear.
entries.value: Gamitin AI simulations bilang pag-aaral scaffolds habang keeping mga source, ebidensya, at interpretation malinaw.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.

entries.source: Use AI to pressure-test your reasoning, surface assumptions, and improve decisions.

entries.source: Use AI to slow down reasoning, check steps, debug mistakes, and practise concepts.
